OncoPulse
Case Volume Imaging Method
REAL DATA
Real TCGA-BRCA DCE-MRI · patient-derived tumor viewer

ONCOPULSE

Two breast-cancer subtypes from the TCGA-BRCA archive — Luminal A and Basal-like — pulled from diagnostic DCE-MRI, resampled to a 64³ field, and rendered as interactive 3D volumes. Switch case, timepoint, and render mode below.

Browse the volumes → How it's built
ARCHIVE TCGA-BRCACASES 2 SUBTYPES LUMINAL A · BASALMODALITY DCE-MRI GRID 64³ ISOTROPICPIPELINE DICOM → RESAMPLE → RENDER ARCHIVE TCGA-BRCACASES 2 SUBTYPES LUMINAL A · BASALMODALITY DCE-MRI GRID 64³ ISOTROPICPIPELINE DICOM → RESAMPLE → RENDER

04

From archive to viewer

01 · ACQUIRE

TCGA-BRCA DICOM

Matched baseline + follow-up DCE-MRI studies pulled from the TCIA public archive for each subtype.

02 · EXTRACT

Resample to 64³

Philip & Chandan's pipeline registers and resamples each study to a 64³ isotropic field normalized to [0, 1].

03 · VISUALIZE

Interactive 3D

Rendered by value as volumetric / isosurface / cutaway, with orthogonal radiology slices — this layer.

Real scans. Real subtypes. Interrogate the volume — case by case, plane by plane.
